Orion Zou

#### What's great

I have very mixed feelings about using Manus.

On one hand, I’m genuinely impressed by its high efficiency and task completion — it can quickly and accurately build product prototypes based on my needs.

On the other hand, when I invited my friends to try it, the system falsely flagged me for “fake referrals” and suspended my account — even though my friends actually subscribed.

I’ve reached out to their support team multiple times, but the issue has never been resolved. [...] I honestly don’t understand what their support team is doing. No matter how great a product is, poor customer service can easily ruin it.

#### What needs improvement

Please pay more attention to customer service.

Rafaella Fontes

#### What's great

transformed how i think of myself as a builder and enabled so much internal tooling that has been a joy to build and use

#### What needs improvement

customer service - takes forever to get to a human. billing can be a bit ambiguous

SURYA PRATAP SINGH

#### What's great

Really impressed by how this product turns a high-level goal into a multi-step workflow. The autonomous execution and practical use case make it a strong example of agentic AI.

Rebecca

Image 6: Roman Ledak

Roman Ledak

•1 review

#### What's great

I love how it learns from its own errros - like a real smart human do. After several weeks working with it I have full confidence that Vy is doing great job, releasing bunch of my time.

#### What needs improvement

Sometimes really stupid errors happen in the places human would not conduct any error. but it is a part of the Moravec paradox. So you need to be careful using it, until no errros conducted for longer period.

#### vs Alternatives

Image 7: ManusManus

Loved free tier, and believe this product would become much better in short period of time.

results.title: Manus Shopify Connector: Build and manage Shopify stores from one chat | Product Hunt
results.content:
### Social & Community

### Finance

### AI Agents

### Trending categories

### Top reviewed

### Trending products

### Top forum threads

Fin 

What do you think? …

Rohan Chaubey

Running a Shopify store still means living across too many tabs.

Manus's Shopify connector brings storefront building, catalog management, and campaign generation into a single chat, with Shopify staying in the background handling checkout, payments, and fulfillment.

The problem is coordination cost. Every task, adding products, briefing a campaign, reading sales data, lives in a different tool. Manus connects directly to your Shopify store via API and handles the operational layer on top, so the same conversation where you build the store is where you run it.

Here is what it covers: [...] P.S. I hunt the latest and greatest launches in tech, SaaS and AI, follow to be notified → @rohanrecommends

Anna Ludwinowski

@rohanrecommends Like the idea, have many questions that have already been asked. But how does it compare to SellerClaw, which also launched this week??

sanreds

Curious about the planning layer here. When a user says "launch a summer campaign," does Manus build one long plan upfront and execute, or does it interleave plan, execute, replan after each tool call? The first is cheaper but brittle when Shopify's API returns something unexpected. The second handles drift better but burns tokens. Which side did you fall on, and how did you decide?

Anna Ludwinowski [...] Manus Shopify Connector
